files.description: Paul Kropp / Manitoba Education alternate formats sample. Pure ASCII Braille (North American Braille Computer Code), CRLF line endings, form-feed (0x0C) page breaks, no BOM. 1725 lines, 69 form feeds, byte-identical round-trip target. Source for tests/unit/io/test_open_read.py and the BRF page map / page detection / save round-trip tests.
